name: MOHIT GUPTA
title: Delivery Lead
bio: AI enthusiast Delivery Lead who turns strategy into measurable outcomes while working at the intersection of Product, Engineering & Commercial teams.

qaPairs.question: Tell me about yourself
qaPairs.answer: AI enthusiast Delivery Lead experimenting with AI to create products that provide an alternative perspective or help solve a problem

qaPairs.question: What are your strengths?
qaPairs.answer: My biggest strengths are High agency and Growth mindset

qaPairs.question: How do you handle feedback or criticism?
qaPairs.answer: I would put myself in other's shoe and would try to think from their perspective why was the feedback provided, ask clarifying questions and make a plan to address the gap

qaPairs.question: How do you prioritize work?
qaPairs.answer: Prioritize work  that would affect the key KPIS. Delegate where possible.

qaPairs.question: How do you handle conflict?
qaPairs.answer: Conflict is an another opportunity to align better

qaPairs.question: What are your long-term career goals?
qaPairs.answer: Work on interesting AI products/projects that contribute to solving genuine problems
